summary: First-finish smoke test complete for IKAI NO SŌSUITAN. All 7 backend endpoints and all 6 frontend flows work end-to-end. Illustration generation via Gemini Nano Banana produced a 1.1MB base64 image in ~8s and displayed correctly on /read/2.
passed: GET /api/novel -> title/subtitle/volume/total_chapters=17/total_words=78578, 6 characters (Dyan, Rias, Kaede, Ren, Daigo, Garen), synopsis present
GET /api/novel/chapters -> 17 chapters, first is 'Capítulo 1 — El despertar' with index/number/subtitle/title/word_count
POST /api/novel/illustration {chapter_index:2} -> cached=false, image_base64 len=1,156,360, prompt len=1463 (8s); second call -> cached=true
Home page loads with start-reading-btn and three tabs (synopsis/characters/chapters)
Characters tab shows characters-grid containing Dyan and Rias
Chapters tab shows chapters-list with exactly 17 chapter-link-* items; click chapter-link-3 navigates to /read/3
/read/1 shows chapter-body (22,571 chars), prev-chapter-btn disabled, next-chapter-btn enabled
menu-toggle opens side-drawer with drawer-tab-toc/chars/settings; settings shows font-increase/decrease/slider and theme-light/dark buttons; interactions work
/read/2 generate-illustration-btn triggers Gemini generation and chapter-illustration renders (verified visually in screenshot)
notes: Illustration generation is fast (~8s) — well under the 60-90s budget. Cache and delete flows verified. No blockers found.
